seoTitle: Wongamine vs Wongan Hills — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wongamine and Wongan Hills. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Wongamine vs Wongan Hills: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wongamine and Wongan Hills.
heading: Wongamine vs Wongan Hills — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wongamine, Western Australia and Wongan Hills, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wongamine has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Wongan Hills (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wongamine or Wongan Hills safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wongamine has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Wongan Hills scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wongamine scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Wongan Hills scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wongamine or Wongan Hills?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wongamine has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
